summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of new Ecommerce Payments page (/ecommerce-payments). All 12 test cases passed. Page has correct SEO meta tags, OG tags, 4 JSON-LD schemas, breadcrumb navigation, all 9 H2 sections with data-testid attributes, 6 FAQ questions with expand/collapse, CTA buttons, navigation menu integration, and sitemap entry.

passed: 1. /ecommerce-payments loads with H1: 'Ecommerce Payment Processing & Hosted Payment Solutions' (data-testid='hero-h1')
2. SEO meta title: 'Ecommerce Payment Processing & Hosted Payment Solutions | Merchant Solutions Corp'
3. OG tags present: og:title, og:description, og:url
4. Breadcrumb shows: Home > Online Payments > Ecommerce Payments (data-testid='breadcrumb')
5. All 9 H2 sections present with data-testid: how-it-works-h2, gateway-h2, hosted-pages-h2, payment-links-h2, fraud-protection-h2, payment-methods-h2, why-msc-h2, marketing-h2, faq-h2
6. FAQ section has 6 questions with working expand/collapse functionality
7. CTA section has 'Get a Quote' (cta-quote-btn) and 'Book a Demo' (cta-demo-btn) buttons
8. Navigation menu under 'POS & Hardware' > 'Online Payments' has 'Ecommerce Payments' link pointing to /ecommerce-payments
10. Internal links section has 8 links including /online-payments, /payment-processing-pricing, etc.
11. JSON-LD schemas present: Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, Organization

critical_code_review_comments: EcommercePayments.jsx is well-structured with comprehensive SEO implementation
All 9 content sections properly implemented with data-testid attributes for testing
JSON-LD schemas properly embedded using Helmet (Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, Organization)
FAQ component uses proper Schema.org markup with itemScope/itemProp attributes
Navigation.jsx correctly adds Ecommerce Payments under Online Payments section
Home.jsx correctly updated to link Online Payments card to /ecommerce-payments
Footer.jsx has Online Payments link to /ecommerce-payments
sitemap.xml properly updated with new URL
seed_data_creation: N/A - Content/SEO website with no database operations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ecommerce Payments page complete. All 12 tests passed: (1) H1 with data-testid='hero-h1', (2) Meta title correct, (3) All 3 OG tags present, (4) Breadcrumb with Home > Online Payments > Ecommerce Payments, (5) All 9 H2 sections with data-testid attrs, (6) 6 FAQ questions with expand/collapse, (7) CTA buttons working, (8) Navigation menu has Ecommerce Payments under POS & Hardware > Online Payments, (9) Homepage Online Payments card links to /ecommerce-payments, (10) 8 internal links in footer section, (11) 4 JSON-LD schemas (Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, Organization), (12) sitemap.xml has /ecommerce-payments entry.
